fire-bolt.name: Fire Bolt
fire-bolt.description: A ranged spell attack hurls a mote of fire at a creature or object.

magic-missile.name: Magic Missile
magic-missile.description: Creates three glowing darts of magical force that strike unerringly.

shield.name: Shield
shield.description: An invisible barrier grants +5 AC until the start of the next turn, including against the triggering attack.

cure-wounds.name: Cure Wounds
cure-wounds.description: A touched creature regains a number of hit points.

guidance.name: Guidance
guidance.description: A touched creature may add 1d4 to one ability check before the spell ends.

ray-of-frost.name: Ray of Frost
ray-of-frost.description: A beam of freezing air streaks toward a creature, chilling it and slowing its movement.

acid-splash.name: Acid Splash
acid-splash.description: Hurls a bubble of acid at one or two creatures within 5 feet of each other, splattering them with caustic liquid.

poison-spray.name: Poison Spray
poison-spray.description: Projects a puff of noxious gas at a creature, causing it to choke and retch.

chill-touch.name: Chill Touch
chill-touch.description: A ghostly, skeletal hand reaches out to grasp a creature, dealing necrotic damage and preventing it from healing until the start of the caster's next turn. If the target is undead it also flees in fear.

mage-hand.name: Mage Hand
mage-hand.description: Creates a spectral, floating hand that can manipulate objects, open doors, and carry small items at the caster's direction.

prestidigitation.name: Prestidigitation
prestidigitation.description: A minor magical trick: create a small sensory effect, light or snuff a small flame, clean or soil an object, or similar trivial feats of magic.

minor-illusion.name: Minor Illusion
minor-illusion.description: Creates a harmless illusory sound or image within range that persists for the duration, convincing enough to fool a casual glance.

message.name: Message
message.materials: a short piece of copper wire
message.description: A whispered word travels directly to a chosen creature's ear, and it may reply in a whisper only the caster hears.

light.name: Light
light.description: Causes an object to shed bright light in a 20-foot radius, and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

dancing-lights.name: Dancing Lights
dancing-lights.materials: a bit of phosphorus or wychwood, or a glowworm
dancing-lights.description: Creates up to four torch-sized lights that can be shaped into glowing spheres, flames, or humanoid shapes and moved about the area.

sacred-flame.name: Sacred Flame
sacred-flame.description: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature that must succeed on a Dexterity save or be seared, ignoring cover.

thaumaturgy.name: Thaumaturgy
thaumaturgy.description: Manifests a minor wonder such as a booming voice, flickering flames, tremoring ground, or a door swinging open, as a sign of supernatural power.

spare-the-dying.name: Spare the Dying
spare-the-dying.description: A touched creature with 0 hit points becomes stable, staving off death without restoring consciousness.

resistance.name: Resistance
resistance.description: A touched creature may add 1d4 to one saving throw of its choice before the spell ends.

druidcraft.name: Druidcraft
druidcraft.description: A minor bit of nature magic: predict the weather, make a flower bloom, create a harmless sensory effect, or snuff a small flame.

produce-flame.name: Produce Flame
produce-flame.description: A flickering flame appears in the caster's hand, sheds light, and can be hurled at a creature within 30 feet.

shillelagh.name: Shillelagh
shillelagh.materials: mistletoe, a shamrock leaf, and a club or quarterstaff
shillelagh.description: Imbues a club or quarterstaff with nature magic, letting the wielder use Wisdom for its attack and damage rolls, dealing 1d8 damage.

vicious-mockery.name: Vicious Mockery
vicious-mockery.description: Unleashes a string of withering insults laced with subtle magic at a creature, rattling its confidence if it fails a save.

true-strike.name: True Strike
true-strike.description: The caster briefly glimpses a target's defenses, granting advantage on the next attack roll against it before the end of the caster's next turn.

eldritch-blast.name: Eldritch Blast
eldritch-blast.description: A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a creature. The caster gains an additional beam at levels 5, 11, and 17, each requiring a separate attack roll.

blade-ward.name: Blade Ward
blade-ward.description: Traces a warding sign that grants resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from weapon attacks until the caster's next turn.

friends.name: Friends
friends.materials: a small amount of makeup applied to the face as this spell is cast
friends.description: Grants advantage on Charisma checks toward one non-hostile creature for the duration, though it becomes suspicious once the spell ends.

control-flames.name: Control Flames
control-flames.description: Manipulates a nonmagical flame, expanding, shrinking, changing its color, or shaping it into a harmless form for up to an hour.

gust.name: Gust
gust.description: Conjures a small gust of wind that can push a creature back 5 feet, snuff small flames, or disperse light gases.

mold-earth.name: Mold Earth
mold-earth.description: Reshapes a section of loose earth, digging a small pit, smoothing rubble, or causing a minor tremor of dirt.

shape-water.name: Shape Water
shape-water.description: Molds a body of unattended water, changing its color, freezing it, forming it into simple shapes, or making it flow in a chosen direction.

mending.name: Mending
mending.description: Repairs a single break or tear in an object, mending it completely as long as the missing piece is no larger than the object allows.

create-bonfire.name: Create Bonfire
create-bonfire.description: Creates a small bonfire on the ground that burns anything standing in its space and can be sustained for the duration.

frostbite.name: Frostbite
frostbite.description: Numbing frost seizes a creature that fails a save, dealing cold damage and giving it disadvantage on its next weapon attack roll.

infestation.name: Infestation
infestation.description: A cloud of stinging insects briefly swarms a creature, and if it fails a save it takes poison damage and may be forced to shuffle a few feet.

lightning-lure.name: Lightning Lure
lightning-lure.description: A crackling whip of lightning lashes out at a nearby creature, damaging it and, if it fails a save, yanking it up to 10 feet closer.

sword-burst.name: Sword Burst
sword-burst.description: A ring of spectral blades erupts around the caster, slashing at every creature nearby that fails a Dexterity save.

toll-the-dead.name: Toll the Dead
toll-the-dead.description: A sepulchral bell tolls in the mind of a creature that fails a Wisdom save, dealing more damage if the target is already wounded.
toll-the-dead.damage: 1d8 or 1d12 necrotic (if target is missing hp), scaling with level

word-of-radiance.name: Word of Radiance
word-of-radiance.description: Speaking a holy word sears every creature of the caster's choice within range that fails a Constitution save.

green-flame-blade.name: Green-Flame Blade
green-flame-blade.materials: a melee weapon worth at least 1 sp
green-flame-blade.description: A melee weapon attack is wreathed in green fire; on a hit, a tongue of flame leaps to a second nearby creature.
green-flame-blade.damage: Weapon damage plus 1d8 fire (leaping damage scales with level)

booming-blade.name: Booming Blade
booming-blade.materials: a melee weapon worth at least 1 sp
booming-blade.description: A melee weapon attack is sheathed in a thunderous echo; if the target moves before the caster's next turn, it takes an extra burst of thunder damage.
booming-blade.damage: Weapon damage plus 1d8 thunder if the target moves

healing-word.name: Healing Word
healing-word.description: A creature of the caster's choice within range regains hit points, quickly spoken as a word of restorative magic.
healing-word.higherLevels: Healing increases by 1d4 for each slot level above 1st.

bless.name: Bless
bless.description: Up to three chosen creatures within range add 1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws for the duration.
bless.higherLevels: One additional creature can be targeted for each slot level above 1st.

guiding-bolt.name: Guiding Bolt
guiding-bolt.description: A flash of light streaks toward a creature and explodes on impact, and the next attack made against it before the end of the caster's next turn has advantage.
guiding-bolt.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

faerie-fire.name: Faerie Fire
faerie-fire.description: Outlines every creature in a chosen area with glowing light unless it succeeds on a save, removing the benefit of invisibility and granting attackers advantage against it.

sleep.name: Sleep
sleep.materials: a pinch of fine sand, rose petals, or a cricket
sleep.description: A wave of magical drowsiness spreads through an area, dropping weaker creatures into unconsciousness starting with the lowest current hit points.
sleep.higherLevels: The pool of affected hit points increases by 2d8 for each slot level above 1st.

detect-magic.name: Detect Magic
detect-magic.description: The caster senses the presence of magic within 30 feet and, by focusing on a source, can learn its school of magic if visible.

identify.name: Identify
identify.materials: a pearl worth at least 100 gp and an owl feather
identify.description: By touching an object or creature, the caster learns its magical properties, how to activate them, and any attunement requirements.

mage-armor.name: Mage Armor
mage-armor.description: A protective magical force surrounds a willing creature not wearing armor, setting its base AC to 13 plus its Dexterity modifier.

thunderwave.name: Thunderwave
thunderwave.description: A wave of thunderous force ripples outward from the caster, damaging and shoving back creatures who fail a Constitution save.
thunderwave.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

burning-hands.name: Burning Hands
burning-hands.description: A thin sheet of flame sweeps out from the caster's spread fingers, engulfing anything in a cone-shaped area.
burning-hands.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

charm-person.name: Charm Person
charm-person.description: A humanoid that fails a Wisdom save regards the caster as a friendly acquaintance for the duration, ending early if harmed.
charm-person.higherLevels: One additional humanoid can be targeted for each slot level above 1st, as long as targets are within 30 feet of each other.

disguise-self.name: Disguise Self
disguise-self.description: Changes the caster's appearance, including clothing and gear, into another humanoid form of similar size, though the illusion won't survive physical inspection.

comprehend-languages.name: Comprehend Languages
comprehend-languages.materials: a pinch of soot and salt
comprehend-languages.description: The caster understands the literal meaning of any spoken language heard and any written language read for the duration.

absorb-elements.name: Absorb Elements
absorb-elements.description: Cast in response to taking acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage, this spell halves that damage and stores the rest, adding it to the caster's next melee attack before the end of their next turn.
absorb-elements.higherLevels: The stored damage die increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

catapult.name: Catapult
catapult.materials: no material component in this version; a small crafted focus
catapult.description: Hurls a loose, nonmagical object weighing up to 5 pounds toward a point, striking any creature there that fails a Dexterity save.
catapult.damage: 3d8 bludgeoning, acid, cold, fire, or lightning
catapult.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

feather-fall.name: Feather Fall
feather-fall.materials: a small feather or piece of down
feather-fall.description: Slows the descent of up to five falling creatures to a gentle drift, preventing fall damage until they land.

find-familiar.name: Find Familiar
find-familiar.materials: 10 gp worth of charcoal, incense, and herbs, consumed by fire in a brass brazier
find-familiar.description: Summons a spirit that takes the form of a small animal chosen by the caster, serving as a loyal companion that can deliver touch spells and scout independently.

longstrider.name: Longstrider
longstrider.description: A touched creature's walking speed increases by 10 feet for the duration.
longstrider.higherLevels: One additional creature can be targeted for each slot level above 1st.

silent-image.name: Silent Image
silent-image.description: Creates a purely visual illusion of an object, creature, or phenomenon that the caster can mentally reshape and move within range.

unseen-servant.name: Unseen Servant
unseen-servant.materials: a piece of string and a bit of wood
unseen-servant.description: Creates an invisible, mindless force that can perform simple tasks such as fetching, cleaning, or opening doors at the caster's command.

invisibility.name: Invisibility
invisibility.materials: an eyelash encased in gum arabic
invisibility.description: A touched creature and its worn gear become invisible until the spell ends or the target attacks or casts a spell.
invisibility.higherLevels: One additional creature can be targeted for each slot level above 2nd.

misty-step.name: Misty Step
misty-step.description: The caster is briefly surrounded by silvery mist and teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space they can see.

scorching-ray.name: Scorching Ray
scorching-ray.description: Three separate rays of fire streak toward targets within range, each requiring its own attack roll.
scorching-ray.higherLevels: One additional ray is created for each slot level above 2nd.

web.name: Web
web.description: Fills a 20-foot cube with thick, sticky webbing that heavily obscures the area and restrains creatures failing a Dexterity save.

hold-person.name: Hold Person
hold-person.materials: a small, straight piece of iron
hold-person.description: A humanoid must succeed on a Wisdom save or become paralyzed for the duration, repeating the save at the end of each of its turns.
hold-person.higherLevels: One additional humanoid can be targeted for each slot level above 2nd.

spiritual-weapon.name: Spiritual Weapon
spiritual-weapon.description: Creates a floating spectral weapon that attacks a creature within 5 feet of it, and can be moved to strike a new target as a bonus action on later turns.
spiritual-weapon.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d8 for every two slot levels above 2nd.

spider-climb.name: Spider Climb
spider-climb.materials: a drop of bitumen and a spider
spider-climb.description: A touched creature gains the ability to move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and ceilings while leaving its hands free.

suggestion.name: Suggestion
suggestion.materials: a snake's tongue and either a bit of honeycomb or a drop of sweet oil
suggestion.description: Plants a reasonable-sounding course of action in a creature's mind; if it fails a Wisdom save it pursues that course to the best of its ability.

mirror-image.name: Mirror Image
mirror-image.description: Creates three illusory duplicates of the caster that shift about, causing attackers to potentially strike a duplicate instead of the caster.

counterspell.name: Counterspell
counterspell.description: Interrupts a creature in the process of casting a spell, automatically foiling it if its level is 3rd or lower, or requiring an ability check against higher-level spells.
counterspell.higherLevels: The interruption automatically succeeds against spells of a level equal to or lower than the slot level used.

darkness.name: Darkness
darkness.materials: bat fur and a drop of pitch or piece of coal
darkness.description: Magical darkness spreads from a point within range, filling a 15-foot radius and even snuffing out nonmagical light sources within it.

enlarge-reduce.name: Enlarge/Reduce
enlarge-reduce.description: A creature or object either doubles or halves in size, altering its weight and, for creatures, the damage of its Strength-based weapon attacks.

flaming-sphere.name: Flaming Sphere
flaming-sphere.materials: a bit of tallow, a pinch of brimstone, and a dusting of powdered iron
flaming-sphere.description: Conjures a 5-foot-diameter ball of fire that can be rolled around the battlefield as a bonus action, burning anything it touches.
flaming-sphere.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

gust-of-wind.name: Gust of Wind
gust-of-wind.description: A powerful wind blasts out in a line from the caster, pushing creatures back and hampering ranged attacks and gases within it.

levitate.name: Levitate
levitate.materials: either a small leather loop or a piece of golden wire bent into a cup shape with a long shank on one end
levitate.description: A target creature or object rises vertically off the ground and floats there, able to be pushed or pulled along by the caster.

phantasmal-force.name: Phantasmal Force
phantasmal-force.description: Plants a phantasmal object, creature, or effect in a target's mind, which it perceives as real and which can deal psychic damage.

ray-of-enfeeblement.name: Ray of Enfeeblement
ray-of-enfeeblement.description: A black beam of enervating energy withers a creature, halving the damage of its Strength-based weapon attacks until the spell ends.

alter-self.name: Alter Self
alter-self.description: The caster shapes their own body, choosing to grow a swimming form, natural weapons, or a disguised appearance for the duration.

blindness-deafness.name: Blindness/Deafness
blindness-deafness.description: A creature that fails a Constitution save is struck blind or deaf for the duration, repeating the save at the end of each of its turns.
blindness-deafness.higherLevels: One additional creature can be targeted for each slot level above 2nd.

blur.name: Blur
blur.description: The caster's outline wavers and doubles, giving attackers disadvantage on attack rolls against them for the duration.

crown-of-madness.name: Crown of Madness
crown-of-madness.description: A ring of horns appears atop a humanoid's head; while charmed, it must attack a target the caster chooses each turn instead of acting freely.

enthrall.name: Enthrall
enthrall.description: A captivating speech distracts anyone who hears and understands it, giving them disadvantage on Wisdom checks to notice anything but the speaker.

moonbeam.name: Moonbeam
moonbeam.materials: several seeds of any moonseed plant and a piece of opalescent feldspar
moonbeam.description: A silvery beam of pale light shines down in a 5-foot-radius cylinder, searing creatures who fail a save and can be moved as a bonus action.
moonbeam.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 2nd.

prayer-of-healing.name: Prayer of Healing
prayer-of-healing.description: Up to six creatures of the caster's choice regain hit points as soothing, prayerful words wash over them.
prayer-of-healing.higherLevels: Healing increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

protection-from-poison.name: Protection from Poison
protection-from-poison.description: A touched creature is cured of one poison affecting it and gains advantage on saves against being poisoned, plus resistance to poison damage, for the duration.

fireball.name: Fireball
fireball.materials: a tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur
fireball.description: A bright streak flashes to a point and erupts into a roaring ball of flame that engulfs a 20-foot-radius area.
fireball.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

lightning-bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
lightning-bolt.materials: a bit of fur and a rod of amber, crystal, or glass
lightning-bolt.description: A stroke of lightning blasts out from the caster in a line, striking everything in its path.
lightning-bolt.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

fly.name: Fly
fly.materials: a wing feather from any bird
fly.description: A touched creature gains a flying speed of 60 feet for the duration.
fly.higherLevels: One additional creature can be targeted for each slot level above 3rd.

haste.name: Haste
haste.description: A willing creature's speed doubles, it gains a bonus to AC and Dexterity saves, and it gains an extra action limited to one option each turn.

revivify.name: Revivify
revivify.materials: diamonds worth 300 gp, which the spell consumes
revivify.description: A creature that died within the last minute returns to life with 1 hit point, though it cannot restore missing body parts.

dispel-magic.name: Dispel Magic
dispel-magic.description: Ends spell effects on a chosen creature, object, or magical effect, automatically succeeding against spells of 3rd level or lower.
dispel-magic.higherLevels: Effects created by spells of a level equal to or lower than the slot used are automatically ended.

fear.name: Fear
fear.materials: a white feather or the heart of a hen
fear.description: Projects a phantasmal image of the caster's choosing that terrifies each creature in the cone, causing it to drop what it holds and flee.

animate-dead.name: Animate Dead
animate-dead.materials: a drop of blood, a piece of flesh, and a pinch of bone dust
animate-dead.description: Reanimates a corpse or pile of bones into a skeleton or zombie under the caster's control, which fights on its behalf indefinitely.
animate-dead.higherLevels: Two additional undead can be animated for each slot level above 3rd.

bestow-curse.name: Bestow Curse
bestow-curse.materials: a small crafted focus appropriate to the spell
bestow-curse.description: A touched creature suffers a curse of the caster's choosing, such as disadvantage on ability checks or extra necrotic damage from the caster's attacks.
bestow-curse.higherLevels: At 4th level the duration becomes concentration up to 10 minutes; at 5th level it lasts 8 hours without concentration; at 9th level it lasts until removed.

clairvoyance.name: Clairvoyance
clairvoyance.materials: a focus worth at least 100 gp, either a jeweled horn for hearing or a glass eye for seeing
clairvoyance.description: Creates an invisible sensor at a known or previously visited location, letting the caster see or hear through it as chosen.

nondetection.name: Nondetection
nondetection.materials: a pinch of diamond dust worth 25 gp sprinkled over the target, which the spell consumes
nondetection.description: Hides a target creature or object from divination magic such as scrying sensors and detection spells for the duration.

protection-from-energy.name: Protection from Energy
protection-from-energy.description: A touched creature gains resistance to one damage type of the caster's choosing among acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder.

remove-curse.name: Remove Curse
remove-curse.description: Ends all curses affecting a touched creature or object, and detaches any cursed item that would otherwise resist removal.

sending.name: Sending
sending.materials: a short piece of fine copper wire
sending.description: A short message of 25 words or fewer is sent to a familiar creature anywhere, who can send a reply of equal length immediately.

sleet-storm.name: Sleet Storm
sleet-storm.materials: a pinch of dust and a few drops of water
sleet-storm.description: Freezing rain and sleet fall in a 40-foot-radius cylinder, heavily obscuring the area, coating the ground with slick ice, and dousing open flames.

speak-with-dead.name: Speak with Dead
speak-with-dead.description: Animates a corpse's mouth to answer up to five questions, though it can lie or refuse if it was hostile in life.

spirit-guardians.name: Spirit Guardians
spirit-guardians.description: Protective spirits swirl around the caster, damaging hostile creatures that enter or start their turn nearby and halving their speed.
spirit-guardians.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.

tongues.name: Tongues
tongues.materials: a small clay model of a ziggurat
tongues.description: A touched creature can understand any spoken language and be understood by anyone who knows at least one language, for the duration.

vampiric-touch.name: Vampiric Touch
vampiric-touch.description: The caster's hand drains life from a creature they touch, dealing necrotic damage and restoring half as many hit points to the caster.
vampiric-touch.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

water-walk.name: Water Walk
water-walk.description: Up to ten willing creatures gain the ability to move across any liquid surface as if it were solid ground.

banishment.name: Banishment
banishment.materials: an item distasteful to the target
banishment.description: A creature that fails a Charisma save is sent to a harmless demiplane if native to the current plane, or banished home entirely if not, for the duration.
banishment.higherLevels: One additional creature can be targeted for each slot level above 4th.

confusion.name: Confusion
confusion.description: Assails the minds of creatures in a 10-foot-radius area, causing each affected creature to act randomly on its turn.

dominate-beast.name: Dominate Beast
dominate-beast.description: A beast that fails a Wisdom save becomes charmed and can be telepathically commanded by the caster for the duration.
dominate-beast.higherLevels: The duration increases to 10 minutes at 5th level, 1 hour at 6th level, and 8 hours at 7th level or higher.

greater-invisibility.name: Greater Invisibility
greater-invisibility.description: A touched creature turns invisible for the duration, keeping the benefit even while attacking or casting spells.

ice-storm.name: Ice Storm
ice-storm.materials: a pinch of dust and a few drops of water
ice-storm.description: A hail of rock-hard ice pounds a 20-foot-radius cylinder, battering creatures with bludgeoning and cold damage.
ice-storm.higherLevels: Bludgeoning damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

locate-creature.name: Locate Creature
locate-creature.materials: a bit of fur from a bloodhound
locate-creature.description: Senses the direction and rough distance to a familiar creature or type of creature within a mile, as long as no barrier blocks the path.

polymorph.name: Polymorph
polymorph.description: Transforms a willing creature, or one that fails a Wisdom save, into a beast form whose statistics replace its own until the spell ends.

stoneskin.name: Stoneskin
stoneskin.materials: diamond dust worth 100 gp, which the spell consumes
stoneskin.description: A touched creature's skin hardens, granting resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage for the duration.

wall-of-fire.name: Wall of Fire
wall-of-fire.description: Creates a wall of roaring flame in a line or ring that burns any creature passing through it or ending its turn nearby.
wall-of-fire.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

arcane-eye.name: Arcane Eye
arcane-eye.description: Creates an invisible, magical eye that flies at the caster's mental command, sending back everything it sees and hears.

black-tentacles.name: Black Tentacles
black-tentacles.materials: a piece of tentacle from a giant octopus or a giant squid
black-tentacles.description: Squirming black tentacles fill a 20-foot square, seizing and crushing every creature that enters or starts its turn there.

blight.name: Blight
blight.description: Necromantic energy withers a creature, though plant creatures and objects made of plant material take heightened damage.
blight.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

dimension-door.name: Dimension Door
dimension-door.description: The caster teleports instantly to a spot they can visualize within range, optionally bringing along one willing creature within 5 feet.

divination.name: Divination
divination.materials: incense and a sacrificial offering appropriate to the caster's religion, together worth at least 25 gp, which the spell consumes
divination.description: The caster petitions for an omen about a specific goal, event, or activity within the next 7 days, receiving a truthful but cryptic reply.

freedom-of-movement.name: Freedom of Movement
freedom-of-movement.materials: a leather strap, bound around the arm or a similar appendage
freedom-of-movement.description: A touched creature ignores difficult terrain and cannot be restrained or have its speed reduced by any means for the duration.

giant-insect.name: Giant Insect
giant-insect.materials: a small crafted focus appropriate to the spell
giant-insect.description: Transforms up to ten centipedes, three spiders, five wasps, or one scorpion into giant versions under the caster's command.

hallucinatory-terrain.name: Hallucinatory Terrain
hallucinatory-terrain.materials: a stone, a twig, and a bit of green plant
hallucinatory-terrain.description: Makes a natural terrain feature within a large area look, sound, and smell like a different natural feature, though it remains physically unchanged.

commune.name: Commune
commune.materials: incense and a vial of holy or unholy water
commune.description: The caster contacts a divine entity to ask up to three yes-or-no questions, receiving a truthful answer for each within the spell's duration.

contagion.name: Contagion
contagion.description: A touched creature is infected with a virulent magical disease of the caster's choosing that worsens if failed saves accumulate.

insect-plague.name: Insect Plague
insect-plague.materials: a few grains of sugar, some kernels of grain, and a smear of fat
insect-plague.description: A swarm of biting, stinging insects fills a 20-foot-radius sphere, lightly obscuring it and damaging creatures within.
insect-plague.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 5th.

mass-cure-wounds.name: Mass Cure Wounds
mass-cure-wounds.description: A wave of healing energy washes over up to six creatures in a 30-foot-radius area, restoring hit points to each.
mass-cure-wounds.higherLevels: Healing increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 5th.

awaken.name: Awaken
awaken.materials: an agate worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes
awaken.description: Bestows sentience upon a beast or plant creature, granting it human-level intelligence and the ability to speak one language known by the caster.

chain-lightning.name: Chain Lightning
chain-lightning.materials: a bit of fur; a piece of amber, glass, or a crystal rod; and three silver pins
chain-lightning.description: A crackling bolt of lightning arcs to a primary target and then leaps to up to three additional nearby creatures.
chain-lightning.higherLevels: One additional bolt strikes a new target for each slot level above 6th.

circle-of-death.name: Circle of Death
circle-of-death.materials: the powder of a crushed black pearl worth at least 500 gp
circle-of-death.description: A sphere of negative energy bursts outward in a 60-foot radius, withering everything caught within it.
circle-of-death.higherLevels: Damage increases by 2d6 for each slot level above 6th.

cone-of-cold.name: Cone of Cold
cone-of-cold.materials: a small crystal or glass cone
cone-of-cold.description: A blast of frigid air erupts from the caster's hands, coating everything in the cone with rime and biting cold.
cone-of-cold.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 5th.

contingency.name: Contingency
contingency.materials: a statuette of the caster carved from ivory and decorated with gems worth at least 1,500 gp
contingency.description: Chooses another spell of 5th level or lower cast on the caster to trigger automatically when a stated circumstance occurs.

disintegrate.name: Disintegrate
disintegrate.materials: a lodestone and a pinch of dust
disintegrate.description: A thin green ray disintegrates a creature or object that fails to withstand it, reducing a slain creature to fine dust.
disintegrate.higherLevels: Damage increases by 3d6 for each slot level above 6th.

dominate-person.name: Dominate Person
dominate-person.description: A humanoid that fails a Wisdom save is charmed and can be telepathically commanded by the caster for the duration.
dominate-person.higherLevels: The duration increases to 10 minutes at 6th level, 1 hour at 7th level, and 8 hours at 8th level or higher.

eyebite.name: Eyebite
eyebite.description: For the duration, the caster can glare balefully at one creature per turn, inflicting sleep, panic, or sickness if it fails a save.

mass-suggestion.name: Mass Suggestion
mass-suggestion.materials: a snake's tongue and either a bit of honeycomb or a drop of sweet oil
mass-suggestion.description: Plants a reasonable-sounding course of action in the minds of up to twelve creatures, who pursue it if they fail a Wisdom save.

true-seeing.name: True Seeing
true-seeing.materials: an ointment for the eyes worth 25 gp made from mushroom powder, saffron, and fat, which the spell consumes
true-seeing.description: A touched creature gains truesight, sees through illusions, and can perceive the true form of shapechanged or transmuted creatures for the duration.

wall-of-force.name: Wall of Force
wall-of-force.materials: a pinch of powder made by grinding a clear gemstone
wall-of-force.description: Creates an invisible, immobile wall of pure force that nothing can physically pass through and that resists nearly all damage.

delayed-blast-fireball.name: Delayed Blast Fireball
delayed-blast-fireball.materials: a tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur
delayed-blast-fireball.description: A fiery bead hovers at a point, growing more destructive each round it lingers before detonating in a fiery explosion.
delayed-blast-fireball.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 7th.

finger-of-death.name: Finger of Death
finger-of-death.description: Negative energy pierces a creature, and a humanoid slain by it rises as a zombie under the caster's control on its next turn.

forcecage.name: Forcecage
forcecage.materials: ruby dust worth 1,500 gp, which the spell consumes
forcecage.description: An immobile, invisible cage or barrier of magical force springs up around a chosen area, trapping creatures that fail a save.

plane-shift.name: Plane Shift
plane-shift.materials: a forked, metal rod worth at least 250 gp, attuned to a particular plane of existence
plane-shift.description: A touched creature, and up to eight willing others touching one another, are transported to a different plane of existence.

project-image.name: Project Image
project-image.materials: a small replica of the caster made from materials worth at least 5 gp
project-image.description: Creates an illusory duplicate of the caster that can be sent anywhere within range, through which the caster can see, hear, and speak.

regenerate.name: Regenerate
regenerate.materials: a prayer wheel and holy water
regenerate.description: A touched creature regains hit points and slowly regrows severed limbs and organs over the course of the spell's duration.
regenerate.healing: 4d8 + 15 initially, then 1 hp per minute for the duration

reverse-gravity.name: Reverse Gravity
reverse-gravity.description: Gravity reverses in a large cylindrical area, causing everything not anchored down to fall upward until the spell ends.

sunburst.name: Sunburst
sunburst.materials: fire and a piece of sunstone
sunburst.description: Brilliant sunlight blazes out in a 60-foot radius, blinding creatures and searing them with radiant energy.

teleport.name: Teleport
teleport.description: Instantly transports the caster and up to eight willing creatures to a familiar destination, though unfamiliarity risks a mishap.

dominate-monster.name: Dominate Monster
dominate-monster.description: Any creature that fails a Wisdom save is charmed and can be telepathically commanded by the caster for the duration.
dominate-monster.higherLevels: The duration becomes 8 hours without concentration when cast using a 9th-level slot.

feeblemind.name: Feeblemind
feeblemind.materials: a handful of clay, crystal, glass, or mineral spheres
feeblemind.description: A blast of mental energy assaults a creature, and if it fails a save its Intelligence and Charisma scores are shattered to 1.

foresight.name: Foresight
foresight.description: A touched creature gains an uncanny sense of what is about to happen, granting advantage on attacks, checks, and saves while foes have disadvantage against it.

power-word-stun.name: Power Word Stun
power-word-stun.description: Speaks a single word of power that stuns a creature outright unless its hit points exceed the spell's threshold.

prismatic-wall.name: Prismatic Wall
prismatic-wall.materials: a small crafted focus appropriate to the spell
prismatic-wall.description: Conjures an immobile wall of shimmering, multicolored light, each of its seven bands imposing a different dangerous effect on those who pass through.

resurrection.name: Resurrection
resurrection.materials: a diamond worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes
resurrection.description: Restores life to a creature dead for no more than a century, mending mortal wounds and restoring any missing body parts.

sunbeam.name: Sunbeam
sunbeam.description: A line of radiant light flashes out from the caster's hand, searing and possibly blinding creatures it touches, and can be fired again on later turns.

gate.name: Gate
gate.materials: a diamond worth at least 5,000 gp, which the spell consumes
gate.description: Conjures a shimmering portal linking to a specific location on another plane, through which creatures and objects can pass freely.

mass-heal.name: Mass Heal
mass-heal.description: A flood of healing energy restores hit points among up to six creatures of the caster's choice and cures blindness, deafness, and disease.
mass-heal.healing: 700 total hit points divided as the caster chooses

meteor-swarm.name: Meteor Swarm
meteor-swarm.description: Four blazing orbs streak down to chosen points, each exploding in a fiery, rocky burst that devastates a wide area.

power-word-kill.name: Power Word Kill
power-word-kill.description: Speaks a single word of power that instantly slays a creature outright unless its hit points exceed the spell's threshold.

time-stop.name: Time Stop
time-stop.description: Time freezes for everyone but the caster, who takes a rapid string of extra turns until an action affects another creature or the world moves too far.

true-resurrection.name: True Resurrection
true-resurrection.materials: a sprinkle of holy water and diamonds worth at least 25,000 gp, which the spell consumes
true-resurrection.description: Restores life to a creature dead for up to two centuries, even without remains, fully mending it and restoring any missing body parts.

wish.name: Wish
wish.description: The most powerful spell a mortal can cast, replicating any spell of 8th level or lower without needing its usual requirements, or creating a nearly limitless custom effect at great personal risk.

imprisonment.name: Imprisonment
imprisonment.materials: a vellum depiction or a carved statuette of the target, and a special component that varies according to the version of the spell chosen, worth at least 500 gp per Hit Die of the target
imprisonment.description: Binds a creature that fails a Wisdom save into magical confinement, choosing a form such as burial, chaining, hedged prison, minimus containment, or slumber.

shapechange.name: Shapechange
shapechange.materials: a jade circlet worth at least 1,500 gp, which the caster must place on the head before casting
shapechange.description: The caster transforms into a different creature of challenge rating equal to or less than their level, gaining its statistics while keeping their own mind.

aid.name: Aid
aid.materials: a tiny strip of white cloth
aid.description: Bolsters up to three allies' vitality, increasing their hit point maximum and current hit points for the duration.
aid.healing: 5 temporary hit point maximum increase per target
aid.higherLevels: The hit point increase rises by 5 for each slot level above 2nd.

lesser-restoration.name: Lesser Restoration
lesser-restoration.description: Ends one disease or condition afflicting a touched creature, such as blindness, deafness, paralysis, or poison.

zone-of-truth.name: Zone of Truth
zone-of-truth.description: Creatures within a 15-foot-radius area that fail a save cannot speak a deliberate lie while inside the zone.

find-steed.name: Find Steed
find-steed.description: Summons a loyal spirit that manifests as a powerful, intelligent mount to serve the caster in their quest.

pass-without-trace.name: Pass without Trace
pass-without-trace.materials: ashes from a burned leaf of mistletoe and a sprig of spruce
pass-without-trace.description: A veil of shadows and silence radiates from the caster, granting a large bonus to Stealth checks to allies within 30 feet and hiding them from tracking.

barkskin.name: Barkskin
barkskin.description: A touched creature's skin toughens like bark, setting its AC to no less than 16 for the duration.

protection-from-evil-and-good.name: Protection from Evil and Good
protection-from-evil-and-good.materials: holy water or powdered silver and iron, which the spell consumes
protection-from-evil-and-good.description: A touched creature is warded against aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead, hindering their attempts to charm, frighten, or possess it.

wrathful-smite.name: Wrathful Smite
wrathful-smite.description: The caster's next melee weapon hit crackles with psychic force, dealing extra damage and potentially leaving the target frightened.

divine-favor.name: Divine Favor
divine-favor.description: Divine energy wreathes the caster's weapon, adding radiant damage to the next successful weapon attacks made before the spell ends.

searing-smite.name: Searing Smite
searing-smite.description: The caster's next melee weapon hit flares with fire, searing the target and igniting it so it continues to burn each turn unless treated.
searing-smite.damage: 1d6 fire, plus 1d6 fire at the start of the target's turns

hunters-mark.name: Hunter's Mark
hunters-mark.description: Marks a creature as quarry, dealing extra damage to it whenever the caster hits with a weapon attack and granting tracking advantages.
hunters-mark.higherLevels: The concentration duration extends to 8 hours at 3rd level and 24 hours at 5th level or higher.

ensnaring-strike.name: Ensnaring Strike
ensnaring-strike.description: The caster's next weapon hit causes grasping vines to burst forth, dealing piercing damage and restraining the target unless it succeeds on a save.

goodberry.name: Goodberry
goodberry.description: Creates ten berries infused with magic, each providing modest healing and enough sustenance to feed a creature for a day.

speak-with-animals.name: Speak with Animals
speak-with-animals.description: The caster gains the ability to comprehend and verbally communicate with beasts for the duration.

entangle.name: Entangle
entangle.description: Grasping weeds and vines sprout in a 20-foot square, restraining creatures within unless they succeed on a Strength save.

chromatic-orb.name: Chromatic Orb
chromatic-orb.materials: a diamond worth at least 50 gp
chromatic-orb.description: Hurls a two-inch sphere of energy of a chosen damage type at a creature, the sphere's color reflecting the element chosen.
chromatic-orb.damage: 3d8 (acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder)
chromatic-orb.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

witch-bolt.name: Witch Bolt
witch-bolt.materials: a twig from a tree that has been struck by lightning
witch-bolt.description: A twisting arc of lightning strikes a creature and forms a sustained beam, dealing damage again each turn the caster maintains it.
witch-bolt.higherLevels: Initial damage increases by 1d12 for each slot level above 1st.

animal-friendship.name: Animal Friendship
animal-friendship.description: A beast that fails a Wisdom save regards the caster as a trusted friend for the duration, ending early if harmed.
animal-friendship.higherLevels: One additional beast can be targeted for each slot level above 1st.

expeditious-retreat.name: Expeditious Retreat
expeditious-retreat.description: The caster's speed increases and they can use the Dash action as a bonus action each turn for the duration.

arms-of-hadar.name: Arms of Hadar
arms-of-hadar.description: Tendrils of dark energy erupt from the caster, damaging every creature nearby and briefly preventing them from taking reactions.
arms-of-hadar.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

hellish-rebuke.name: Hellish Rebuke
hellish-rebuke.description: Cast in response to being damaged by a creature, wreathing that creature in hellish flame unless it succeeds on a Dexterity save.
hellish-rebuke.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 1st.

armor-of-agathys.name: Armor of Agathys
armor-of-agathys.description: A protective frost surrounds the caster, granting temporary hit points, and any creature that hits the caster in melee takes cold damage in return.
armor-of-agathys.higherLevels: Both the temporary hit points and retaliation damage increase by 5 for each slot level above 1st.

create-or-destroy-water.name: Create or Destroy Water
create-or-destroy-water.materials: a drop of water if creating water, or a few grains of sand if destroying it
create-or-destroy-water.description: Either creates up to 10 gallons of clean water or destroys an equal amount of water spread across an area, such as a fog bank or a wet surface.
create-or-destroy-water.higherLevels: The amount of water affected doubles for each slot level above 1st.

cloud-of-daggers.name: Cloud of Daggers
cloud-of-daggers.description: Fills the air with spinning daggers in a 5-foot cube, slashing any creature that enters or ends its turn there.

shatter.name: Shatter
shatter.description: A sudden ringing noise painfully loud erupts from a point, damaging every creature in a 10-foot-radius sphere.
shatter.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

see-invisibility.name: See Invisibility
see-invisibility.materials: a pinch of talc and a small sprinkling of powdered silver
see-invisibility.description: The caster sees invisible creatures and objects as if they were visible, and can see into the Ethereal Plane, for the duration.

knock.name: Knock
knock.description: A loud knock sounds as a chosen lock or latch on a door, chest, or shackles springs open, or a stuck object becomes unstuck.

magic-weapon.name: Magic Weapon
magic-weapon.materials: a pinch of powdered iron or a lodestone
magic-weapon.description: A touched nonmagical weapon becomes magical, granting a bonus to its attack and damage rolls for the duration.

hold-monster.name: Hold Monster
hold-monster.materials: a small, straight piece of iron
hold-monster.description: A creature that fails a Wisdom save becomes paralyzed for the duration, repeating the save at the end of each of its turns.
hold-monster.higherLevels: One additional creature can be targeted for each slot level above 5th.

conjure-elemental.name: Conjure Elemental
conjure-elemental.materials: burning incense for air, soft clay for earth, sulfur and phosphorus for fire, or water and sand for water
conjure-elemental.description: Summons an elemental spirit that manifests in an unoccupied space, fighting on the caster's behalf for the duration.

conjure-woodland-beings.name: Conjure Woodland Beings
conjure-woodland-beings.materials: one holly berry per creature summoned
conjure-woodland-beings.description: Summons fey creatures of the forest to fight alongside the caster, appearing in unoccupied spaces within range.

conjure-animals.name: Conjure Animals
conjure-animals.description: Summons spirits that take the form of beasts to fight alongside the caster, appearing in unoccupied spaces within range.

call-lightning.name: Call Lightning
call-lightning.description: A storm cloud forms overhead, and the caster can call down a bolt of lightning to strike a point beneath it each turn.
call-lightning.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 3rd.

daylight.name: Daylight
daylight.description: A 60-foot-radius sphere of bright light spreads from a point, which can dispel magical darkness of a lower level it overlaps.

elemental-weapon.name: Elemental Weapon
elemental-weapon.description: A touched nonmagical weapon becomes magical and takes on an elemental energy, granting a bonus to attack rolls and extra elemental damage.
elemental-weapon.damage: 1d4 acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder
elemental-weapon.higherLevels: The bonuses improve at 5th and 7th level slots.

conjure-minor-elementals.name: Conjure Minor Elementals
conjure-minor-elementals.description: Summons lesser elemental spirits to fight alongside the caster, appearing in unoccupied spaces within range.

wall-of-stone.name: Wall of Stone
wall-of-stone.description: A nonmagical wall of solid stone springs into being on a solid surface, shaped and sized by the caster within its limits.

raise-dead.name: Raise Dead
raise-dead.materials: a diamond worth at least 500 gp, which the spell consumes
raise-dead.description: Returns a dead creature to life, provided its soul is willing and its body is mostly intact, though it does not restore lost body parts.

scrying.name: Scrying
scrying.materials: a focus worth at least 1,000 gp, such as a crystal ball, a silver mirror, or a font filled with holy water
scrying.description: Creates an invisible sensor near a chosen creature anywhere on the plane, letting the caster see and hear through it if the target fails a Wisdom save.

geas.name: Geas
geas.description: A creature that fails a Wisdom save is magically compelled to follow a course of conduct the caster describes, suffering psychic damage each time it disobeys.
geas.higherLevels: The duration becomes a year and a day when cast using an 8th-level slot.

planar-ally.name: Planar Ally
planar-ally.description: Calls forth a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend to perform a task in exchange for a fee it names, requiring negotiation and payment.

heal.name: Heal
heal.description: A surge of positive energy washes through a creature, restoring a large amount of hit points and curing blindness, deafness, and any disease.
heal.higherLevels: Healing increases by 10 for each slot level above 6th.

harm.name: Harm
harm.description: Violent, unnatural energy ravages a creature's body, dealing devastating necrotic damage and reducing its hit point maximum until it recovers.

wall-of-ice.name: Wall of Ice
wall-of-ice.description: Creates a wall of ice on a solid surface, which can be smashed to create a freezing shockwave that damages nearby creatures.
wall-of-ice.higherLevels: Damage and wall hit points increase for each slot level above 6th.

prismatic-spray.name: Prismatic Spray
prismatic-spray.description: Eight rays of shimmering, multicolored light flash from the caster's hand, each ray randomly determined and inflicting a different dangerous effect.
prismatic-spray.damage: 10d6 (varies by ray color: acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or force)

simulacrum.name: Simulacrum
simulacrum.materials: snow or ice in quantities sufficient to make a life-size copy of the target, and some hair, fingernail clippings, or other piece of the target's body placed inside the snow or ice, and powdered ruby worth 1,500 gp, sprinkled over the duplicate and consumed by the spell
simulacrum.description: Creates a duplicate of a beast or humanoid out of snow or ice, obedient to the caster but at only half the original's hit points.

power-word-heal.name: Power Word Heal
power-word-heal.description: A touched creature is restored to full hit points and freed from being charmed, frightened, paralyzed, or stunned, and can rise if unconscious.

guardian-of-faith.name: Guardian of Faith
guardian-of-faith.description: A Large spectral guardian appears and stays near where it was cast, attacking any hostile creature that approaches within 10 feet.

death-ward.name: Death Ward
death-ward.description: A touched creature that would be reduced to 0 hit points instead drops to 1 hit point once, consuming the spell's magic.

fire-storm.name: Fire Storm
fire-storm.description: Roaring flames spread through ten contiguous 10-foot cubes, burning creatures within and optionally leaving the ground scorched and free of plant life.

antimagic-field.name: Antimagic Field
antimagic-field.materials: a pinch of powdered iron or iron filings
antimagic-field.description: A 10-foot-radius sphere of invisible force surrounds the caster, suppressing spells, magic items, and most other supernatural effects within it.

holy-aura.name: Holy Aura
holy-aura.materials: a tiny reliquary worth at least 1,000 gp containing a sacred relic, such as a scrap of cloth from a saint's robe or a piece of parchment from a religious text
holy-aura.description: Divine light flares from the caster, granting allies within range advantage on saving throws and causing attackers who miss them to be blinded.

command.name: Command
command.description: Speaks a single-word command, such as 'drop' or 'flee,' that a creature failing a Wisdom save must obey on its next turn.
command.higherLevels: One additional creature can be targeted for each slot level above 1st.

heroism.name: Heroism
heroism.description: A willing touched creature is imbued with bravery, gaining temporary hit points at the start of each of its turns and immunity to being frightened.
heroism.healing: Temporary hit points equal to spellcasting modifier, renewed each turn
heroism.higherLevels: One additional creature can be targeted for each slot level above 1st.

illusory-script.name: Illusory Script
illusory-script.materials: a lead-based ink worth at least 10 gp, which the spell consumes
illusory-script.description: Writes a message that appears as gibberish to anyone but designated readers, who instead see it in their own language and in the caster's hand.

dissonant-whispers.name: Dissonant Whispers
dissonant-whispers.description: Whispers a discordant melody only one creature can hear, dealing psychic damage and causing it to flee if it fails a Wisdom save.
dissonant-whispers.higherLevels: Damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

bane.name: Bane
bane.description: Up to three creatures within range subtract 1d4 from attack rolls and saving throws for the duration unless they succeed on a Charisma save.
bane.higherLevels: One additional creature can be targeted for each slot level above 1st.
